site.tagline: A Nuxt starter for bilingual docs, blog, and changelog content.

footer.stack: Built with Nuxt 4, Nuxt Content, shadcn-vue, Tailwind, i18n, and Nuxt SEO.
footer.next: Ready for richer docs chrome, search, tagging, and more content workflows.

hero.title: Nuxt template with shadcn-vue, Tailwind, and room to grow heavy.
hero.description: Start with a polished shell today, then layer bilingual docs, blog, SEO, and content workflows on top.

primitives.title: UI primitives
primitives.description: Button, card, navigation, sheet, tooltip, pagination, avatar, and form controls are ready.

tokens.title: Tailwind tokens
tokens.description: CSS variable theming is wired for light and dark mode, with a content-friendly neutral palette.

next.title: Next layer
next.description: The shell is now wired for Nuxt Content, locale-aware routes, and a stronger SEO baseline.

home.title: Build your bilingual docs and blog system on top of real content collections.
home.description: The starter now ships with Nuxt Content collections for docs, blog, and changelog. English stays on the default route space while Chinese is handled through locale-prefixed routes.
home.latestBlogDescription: Sample entries wired from the blog collection.
home.seoDescription: A content-first Nuxt template with shadcn-vue, Nuxt Content, bilingual routing, and SEO foundations.

docs.title: Documentation
docs.description: Starter guides, content architecture, and the first structure for your bilingual knowledge base.
docs.sectionDescription: {count} docs currently live in this section.
docs.tocDescription: Jump directly to the headings in this article.
docs.seoDescription: Starter guides and content architecture for the bilingual Nuxt template.

blog.title: Journal
blog.description: Notes on the template, content system, and design decisions as the starter gets heavier.
blog.tagsDescription: Jump into the topics that shape the current starter.
blog.authorDescription: Read entries grouped by the people maintaining the starter.
blog.authorPostsDescription: Everything currently published under this author profile.
blog.authorTopicsDescription: Use these tags to move from the author archive into related themes.
blog.authorEmpty: This author does not have published posts yet.
blog.authorsIndexDescription: Browse the people and profiles currently publishing into the starter blog.
blog.authorsIndexEmpty: No author profiles have published posts yet.
blog.tagEmpty: No published posts match this tag yet.
blog.tagsIndexDescription: Browse the themes that currently shape the starter blog.
blog.relatedTagsDescription: Keep exploring nearby topics from the same slice of the blog.
blog.seoDescription: Design notes and implementation updates for the bilingual Nuxt content starter.

changelog.title: Release notes
changelog.description: Track how the starter grows from a styling baseline into a fuller content system.
changelog.seoDescription: Release notes for the Gnuxter starter as content, i18n, and SEO capabilities expand.

search.title: Search across docs, blog, and changelog
search.description: Use one search surface to scan the content collections that already ship with the starter.
search.placeholder: Search by title, description, category, or tag
search.empty: No content matches the current search query.
search.seoDescription: Search docs, blog posts, and changelog entries across the bilingual Nuxt starter.
